Street Pole Banners # Street Pole Banners ### Double Sided Pole Banners ![Street Pole Banners | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/20-04-21-bans-street-pole-banners-01-compressor (2).jpg) * [Product Overview](#416ca3cd-b1d1-426a-a8f4-d7ad92a77293) * [Artwork Specs](#00f3516d-1d7c-494d-9613-f7a054d47915) * [Production Times](#3afc9f92-34e7-4d74-a3c6-a8a5fbea949b) * [Payment Options](#cef83040-8f69-4b2c-868d-76a253fed2ac) * [Shipping Options](#a9578bee-83a5-491b-afa4-3676cb3bab50) * [How To Install](#53ec6c2f-4c1e-4c5c-b166-a3e1dc5ce076) #### Pole Banner Material Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. 13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. 18 oz Vinyl Banners Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. #### Finishing Options • The max print size is 72" height x 36" width • Pole banners are printed double sided with pole pockets at the top and bottom • Two hardware options are available: [Standard Bracket System](https://www.banners.com/accessories/standard-hardware) (We recommend only up to 24" as any larger size should use our Wind Deflecting Hardware) and [Wind Deflecting Bracket System](https://www.banners.com/accessories/wind-deflecting-hardware). Pole banners are intended to be used with adjustable hardware. Most commercial banner hardware is adjustable and we do not recommend our product to be used with any non-adjustable/stationary hardware and we will not be held liable if your product doesn't fit. During the printing process, the banners are heated and cooled which may cause the material to expand or shrink, thus we cannot guarantee an exact fit. [Click here to recieve a sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) ******Did we answer all your questions?****** ****If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.**** #### Artwork Guidelines Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. For pole banner artwork, we recommend placing any imagery or wording at least 1" in from where the pole packets will be placed. ![Pole Banner Artwork](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/20-01-16-double-sided-pole-banners-compressor.jpg) #### Artwork/Order Proofs If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolut
